raw_output:
{
  "ground_truth": {
    "direct_deps": [
      "celery.worker.request.Request.on_failure",
      "celery.worker.request.Request.acknowledge",
      "celery.worker.request.Request.reject"
    ],
    "indirect_deps": [
      "celery.exceptions.TimeLimitExceeded",
      "billiard.exceptions.WorkerLostError",
      "celery.exceptions.Reject",
      "celery.exceptions.Ignore",
      "celery.worker.request.Request.task.acks_late",
      "celery.worker.request.Request.task.acks_on_failure_or_timeout",
      "celery.worker.request.Request.task.reject_on_worker_lost"
    ],
    "implicit_deps": [
      "ordinary Exception -> reject(requeue=False)",
      "TimeLimitExceeded with acks_on_timeout=False -> reject(requeue=False)",
      "WorkerLostError with reject_on_worker_lost=False -> reject(requeue=False)",
      "celery.exceptions.Reject -> reject(requeue=exc.requeue)",
      "celery.exceptions.Ignore -> acknowledge"
    ]
  }
}
